basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Project Office Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Mandi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Graduate qualification (B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./B.C.A. or equivalent) are eligible to apply for these Project Office Assistant vacancies. The application process for IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started on 07 May 2026 and will remain open until 18 May 2026. Candidates can download

qualification.details: Project Office Assistant: Essential: Graduate (B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./B.C.A. or equivalent). Desirable: 2 Year relevant experience with knowledge of computer applications.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the IIT Mandi Project Office Assistant recruitment is 18-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Office Assistant post at IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a Graduate degree (B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./B.C.A. or equivalent).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email by sending your resume and required documents to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an offline or online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is IITM/SRIC/Project No. IITM/INT/DCS-CO/23/2026/No.1.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project end date?
faq.answer: The project is scheduled to end on 31-03-2027.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: IIT Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.
